title: Daubert vs. Frye Admissibility Decision Workflow
description: Daubert vs. Frye Admissibility Decision Workflow
creator: Forensic Science Intelligent Textbook
subject: Forensic Science
Forensic Law
Evidence Admissibility
bloomLevel: Analyze (L4) — compare and contrast how the Frye and Daubert standards evaluate the same scientific evidence.
chapter_title: Foundations of Forensic Science and Legal Principles

educational.topic: Evidence Admissibility: Frye and Daubert Standards
learningObjectives: Compare and contrast how Frye and Daubert evaluate the same scientific evidence.
Attribute differences in outcome to the structure of each standard.
educational.prerequisites: Basic understanding of courtroom roles and scientific reliability

pedagogical.interactionPattern: Side-by-side step-through of two decision trees with synchronized scenario, hover definitions, and outcome comparison
pedagogical.assessment: Students complete a Technique/Frye outcome/Daubert outcome table and argue admissibility
